caption: Figure 13.5: Current known status reflecting changes of exploited grouper aggregations globally, as noted by fisher interviews, monitoring, or underwater surveys (N = 509). Long description.
description: A pie chart showing the status of exploited grouper aggregations: Unknown (45%), Decreasing (33%), Same (12%), Increasing (5%), and Gone (5%).

caption: Figure 13.6: Categories of all grouper species (N = 167) according to the IUCN Red List (IUCN Red List Assessments, updated November 2018). Long description.
description: A pie chart showing IUCN Red List categories for grouper species: Least concern (69%), Data deficient (15%), Vulnerable (9%), Near threatened (5%), Endangered (1%), and Critically endangered (1%).
